title: AI image prompts – microlearning ilustrace
subtitle: OnlineŠkolení.cz · 47 témat · 131 lekcí · Ideogram / Midjourney
styleSuffix: A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.
tips: Ke všem promptům použijte poměr stran --ar 4:3.
Pro konzistenci v rámci kurzu použijte stejný --sref nebo seed po vygenerování prvního referenčního obrázku (doporučeno začít kurzem BOZP).
V obrázku nesmí být žádný text – význam jen ikony a kompozice.

courses.title: BOZP — Bezpečnost a ochrana zdraví při práci

themes.prompt: A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Two professional workers in blue-gray uniforms standing side by side on a factory floor: one represents management (subtle tie or clipboard), one a frontline employee (hard hat). Between them a large green safety shield with a subtle checkmark badge. Soft layered shadows, subtle gradients on helmets and shield. A small orange warning triangle in the background, balanced composition, symbolizing joint duty. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. A modern training room scene: presenter at a screen showing abstract safety icons (helmet, shield, first-aid cross), three attentive employees seated at a table with notebooks. Green checkmark badge in corner indicating completed knowledge verification. Soft blue walls, warm orange accent on presentation screen edge. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

themes.titleEn: Work procedures and personal protective equipment
themes.prompt: A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. A warehouse worker in correct PPE: hard hat, safety gloves, safety boots, high-visibility vest. Beside them a detailed checklist clipboard with abstract check icons, a toolbox, and neatly hung gloves. Green badge with checkmark on the glove icon; small red X badge on a crossed-out damaged glove. Layered flat vectors with soft drop shadows. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. A stylized glass bottle and wine glass behind a bold red prohibition circle with diagonal line. Next to it a professional breathalyzer device held by a supervisor's hand (no face detail). Green checkmark badge on a sober worker silhouette; orange warning badge near the bottle. Corporate office-factory hybrid background, minimal and symbolic. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

themes.titleEn: Fire safety duties and utility access
themes.prompt: A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Industrial corridor with clearly accessible utility shutoffs: red valve wheel, electrical panel with open clearance zone marked by green floor markings, fire hose cabinet. Worker keeping path unobstructed. Green checkmark badges on clear access; red X on blocked valve. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. A wide, unobstructed emergency exit corridor with illuminated green running-man exit sign above door, directional arrow signs, and photoluminescent floor strips. Open fire door, no stored boxes in path. Green checkmark badge on exit route. Soft blue-gray architecture, orange accent on door frame. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. A highly detailed red fire extinguisher mounted on wall at eye level, visible pressure gauge, hose, nozzle, and pictogram label area left blank (no text). Calendar icon with green checkmark for annual inspection. Second extinguisher on floor stand with anti-tip base. Soft shadows, metallic gradients. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

themes.titleEn: Fire extinguisher types and correct use
themes.prompt: A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Three distinct extinguishers in a row: water (blue label area), CO2 with black horn nozzle, powder with wide nozzle. Small symbolic fire types beside each: wood flames for water with green check, electrical spark for CO2 with green check, loose powder cloud with red X for wrong use on dust explosion risk. Educational comparison layout. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Instructor pointing at wall map with fire equipment locations (abstract icons only), employees listening. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

themes.titleCs: Příprava před zvednutím a kluzké povrchy
themes.prompt: A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Worker pausing before lifting, hand on chin in assessment pose, checklist icons floating (weight, route, stability). Wet floor with caution sheen and red slip hazard badge; half-full drum with shifting liquid center-of-gravity arrow. Green check on assessment step. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Close-up of hands in anti-cut work gloves with full palm grip on crate (green check) versus fingertip pinch grip (red X). themes.titleEn: RSI, carpal tunnel, and neck strain
themes.prompt: A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Medical-educational flat diagram of hand with highlighted median nerve path (thumb to middle finger tingling stars), forearm muscle strain lines, forward head posture turtle-neck silhouette with red tension dots. Orange warning badges, anatomical but stylized and corporate-friendly. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.

A premium, modern 2D vector illustration for a corporate microlearning app. Office worker stretching arms during micro-break, wall clock showing break interval (abstract hands), eye looking at distant mountain icon through window representing far focus. Three circular icons suggesting 20-20-20 rhythm without text. Green wellness badge. Clean flat design, corporate color palette (soft blues, grays, accents of green and orange), isolated on a solid light gray background. Extremely professional, high detail, no text inside the image.
